title: Why Every Middle-Class Family Will Emotionally Relate to Udne Ki Aasha Right Now!
excerpt: Udne Ki Aasha beautifully captures the struggles, emotions, courtroom tensions, and togetherness that define every middle-class family today.
content:
Middle-class families are often caught between responsibilities, emotions, societal expectations, and survival. They carry the pressure of keeping everything together while silently battling their biggest fears, including financial instability, public humiliation, legal troubles, and betrayal within the household. Udne Ki Aasha is currently bringing these deeply relatable anxieties to life through the ongoing struggles of the Deshmukh family.

As the family finds itself trapped in courtroom drama, accusations, emotional pressure, and growing tensions in their relationships, the show reflects how quickly one problem can shake the peace, respect, and unity of an entire middle-class household. The current track especially captures the fear of a family being dragged into public humiliation while trying to protect themselves and one another.

But beyond the anxieties and emotional chaos, Udne Ki Aasha also beautifully highlights the greatest strength of a middle-class family: togetherness. Through Sailee and Sachin’s unwavering support for each other, and the family standing united during difficult times, the show reminds audiences that no matter how big the storm is, having your loved ones by your side can help you overcome anything.

At a time when relationships are constantly being tested, Udne Ki Aasha stands out by showing that the real backbone of every middle-class home is not money or status, but a family that refuses to abandon one another.

title: COLORS’ Stars Celebrate the Meaning of Family This International Day of Families
excerpt: Krushna Abhishek, Sudhanshu Pandey, Ayesha Singh, and Shakti Anand share heartfelt thoughts on family, love, and togetherness on the occasion of International Day of Families.
content:
COLORS’ stars came together to celebrate the spirit of love, bonding, and togetherness on the occasion of International Day of Families by sharing heartfelt moments and personal reflections about the importance of family in their lives.

Krushna Abhishek from COLORS’ ‘Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment’ shared that laughter has always been the strongest bond in his family. He expressed how even during difficult times, his family always found reasons to smile together. Krushna also spoke about the joy of working alongside his wife Kashmera on the show, where their fun banter and chaos create memorable entertainment for viewers. He thanked the audience for embracing their on-screen family with immense love.

Sudhanshu Pandey, who plays Baldev in ‘Do Duniya Ek Dil’, reflected on how his family remains the biggest source of peace and happiness in his life. The actor spoke emotionally about his bond with his wife and sons and how fatherhood has transformed him into a more patient and emotionally aware person. Sudhanshu also shared how portraying Baldev allowed him to experience a beautiful father-daughter bond onscreen with Aadhya, played by Rachi Sharma, making the role even more meaningful.

Ayesha Singh, essaying the role of Mannat in ‘Mannat Har Khushi Paane Ki’, shared that her family has always been her strongest support system. She especially mentioned her brother as her biggest pillar of strength and connected deeply with the message of her show, which highlights how love, trust, and acceptance form the foundation of every family. Ayesha added that families may not be perfect, but the emotional security they provide helps individuals navigate life’s uncertainties.

Shakti Anand, who plays Mahadev in COLORS’ ‘Mahadev & Sons’, described family as life’s greatest blessing. He opened up about how fatherhood changed him emotionally and how his wife Sai and daughter remain the centre of his world. Shakti shared that his role in ‘Mahadev & Sons’ resonates deeply with his own life because both celebrate unconditional love, emotional strength, and standing by each other through every challenge.

As the stars shared their personal experiences and heartfelt emotions, the message remained clear — family is not about perfection but about love, support, acceptance, and showing up for one another through every phase of life.

Stay tuned to COLORS for more entertainment and heartwarming stories.

title: Dangal TV Launches ‘Tees Key Par – Jab Mila Pyaar’, An Unconventional Love Story Breaking Societal Norms
excerpt: Dangal TV brings a refreshing love story with Tees Key Par – Jab Mila Pyaar, starring Girija Prabhu and Pulkit in an unconventional romance that challenges societal expectations.
content:
Dangal TV is all set to launch its much-awaited new show, Tees Key Par – Jab Mila Pyaar. An unconventional romance that challenges societal expectations.

Dangal TV is bringing a refreshing take on love that dares to break societal norms. At its core, the show is a heartfelt exploration of an unconventional romance shaped by an age gap, bringing together two individuals at very different stages of life. With a compelling narrative that questions deep-rooted beliefs, the story reinforces a powerful thought—love knows no boundaries.

Premiered on 11th May at 9:30 PM from Monday to Saturday, the show promises to deliver a blend of emotion, realism, and progressive storytelling.

Starring Girija Prabhu as Tanvi, a 32-year-old independent woman navigating societal expectations, career responsibilities, and the constant pressure of marriage, the story follows her journey of self-discovery. A grounded and relatable character, Tanvi represents countless women striving to balance duty with personal aspirations.

Opposite her, Pulkit as Yug, a spirited 25-year-old Gen Z man, brings freshness and energy to the narrative. Hailing from an affluent family of sugarcane industrialists in Kolhapur, Yug’s modern outlook on relationships adds an intriguing dynamic to this unconventional love story.

The show also features Ananya Khare, Prajakta Kelkar, Chirag Dave, and Shahab Khan in pivotal roles.

Set against the vibrant cultural backdrop of a Maharashtrian family, Tees Key Par – Jab Mila Pyaar delves into traditions, expectations, and the courage it takes to challenge them—ultimately asking: can love truly rise above societal conventions?

Girija Prabhu shares, “Tees Key Par – Jab Mila Pyaar is extremely special to me. Tanvi is strong, independent, and deeply rooted in her values. She represents so many women who constantly balance societal expectations with their own dreams. What I love most about her journey is how real and relatable it is—it’s not just about finding love, but also about finding yourself. I’m excited for audiences to connect with her story.”

Pulkit adds, “I feel fortunate to be part of Dangal TV’s Tees Key Par – Jab Mila Pyaar. My character Yug is honest, expressive, and unafraid when it comes to love. In many ways, I relate to his energy and emotions. He brings a fresh, unfiltered perspective to relationships that I believe today’s audience will connect with. This story is truly different, and I’m excited for viewers to experience it with us.”

Akshat Singhal, Director, Enterr 10 Television Network, says, “At Dangal TV, we strive to tell stories that resonate deeply while pushing creative boundaries. Tees Key Par – Jab Mila Pyaar is a progressive narrative rooted in Indian values that challenges conventional thinking around love and relationships. It beautifully blends emotion, culture, and realism, and we are confident it will strike a strong chord with audiences across the country.”

Tune in to Tees Key Par – Jab Mila Pyaar from 11th May, Monday to Saturday at 9:30 PM, only on Dangal TV.

title: Bhojpuri Cinema Announces World Television Premiere of ‘Lakho Me Ek Pawle Bani Hum Bahurani’
excerpt: Amrapali Dubey aur Jay Yadav starrer ‘Lakho Me Ek Pawle Bani Hum Bahurani’ ka World Television Premiere 9th May 2026 ko Bhojpuri Cinema par hone ja raha hai.
content:
Bhojpuri Cinema, a leading Bhojpuri entertainment channel, is all set to present the World Television Premiere of 'Lakho Me Ek Pawle Bani Hum Bahurani' on 9th May 2026 at 6:30 PM. The film features Amrapali Dubey and Jay Yadav in lead roles and boasts a strong ensemble cast.

A family-centric Bhojpuri drama, the film celebrates the strength, values, and resilience of a daughter-in-law who stands out among many. It follows her journey of navigating relationships, societal expectations, and emotional challenges within a traditional household, ultimately emerging as the pillar of unity and dignity for the family.

Directed by Ajay Jha and produced by Nishant Ujjwal, the film features a compelling story, screenplay, and dialogue by Arvind Tiwari. The music is composed by Om Jha and Rajnesh Mishra.

The trailer has already created a buzz on social media and YouTube, with audiences appreciating its rooted desi flavour and engaging family drama. In the film, Jay Yadav plays the role of Sheetal’s husband, adding emotional depth to the narrative.

The story revolves around a household with three bahus who constantly trouble their saas. The dynamics shift with the entry of the youngest bahu, Sheetal, played by Amrapali Dubey, whose calm and cultured nature wins over her saasu maa. However, jealousy and conspiracies soon turn her life upside down as she is falsely accused and thrown out of the house. What follows is her emotional journey of resilience, struggle, and reclaiming her dignity.

Amrapali Dubey shared, "‘Lakho Me Ek Pawle Bani Hum Bahurani’ is a deeply relatable household story that inspired me to be a part of this film. Sheetal’s role beautifully reflects strength, patience, and grace, and I’m confident audiences will strongly connect with her journey."

Jay Yadav added, "Working on this film has been a wonderful experience. The story beautifully captures family emotions and relationships, and I’m sure audiences will relate to its emotional depth."

Director Ajay Jha said, "We aimed to create a story that resonates with every household. The film reflects real emotions, relationships, and the strength of a woman within a family setup."

Producer Nishant Ujjwal added, "We are proud to bring this story to audiences through Bhojpuri Cinema. The film combines strong storytelling, music, and performances."

Watch ‘Lakho Me Ek Pawle Bani Hum Bahurani’ World Television Premiere on 9th May 2026 at 6:30 PM only on Bhojpuri Cinema.

excerpt: Mann Ati Sundar ne 1000 episodes ka milestone achieve kar liya hai, jo iske strong storytelling aur audience love ko reflect karta hai.
content:
Dangal TV’s acclaimed family drama Mann Ati Sundar has achieved a remarkable milestone, completing 1000 episodes—a feat that firmly establishes it as one of Indian television’s most loved and impactful shows.

Since its inception, Mann Ati Sundar has struck an emotional chord with viewers through its inspiring narrative and socially relevant messaging. Rooted in the vision of Dangal TV’s Managing Director, Manish Singhal, the show champions body positivity and self-acceptance, encouraging women to embrace themselves with confidence, dignity, and pride.

The show’s heartfelt storytelling has not only entertained but also sparked meaningful conversations around individuality and self-worth, making it a standout among family dramas.

Elevating the narrative further are the standout performances of Sparsh Kotwal as Pratham Mittal and Tanishq Seth as Radhya. Their on-screen chemistry and nuanced portrayals have played a significant role in making the show a household favourite.

Sharing his thoughts on the milestone, Sparsh Kotwal said,

"Reaching 1000 episodes of Mann Ati Sundar is one of the most emotional and proud moments of my journey. This milestone represents the immense love and trust our audience has placed in us over the years."

Tanishq Seth added,

"It feels surreal to celebrate 1000 episodes. I’m deeply grateful to Dangal TV for trusting me with such a meaningful role. The love from audiences has been overwhelming."

title: मिर्जापुर: द मूवी में बढ़ेगी ‘नारियों’ की ताकत? बीना त्रिपाठी से गोलू तक फिर दिखेगा दम
excerpt: मिर्जापुर: द मूवी में क्या इस बार फीमेल कैरेक्टर्स की ताकत और बढ़ेगी? नए किरदारों के साथ फिल्म और भी दमदार होने वाली है।
content:
भारत की सबसे आइकोनिक और फैंस की पसंदीदा क्राइम सागा में से एक ‘मिर्जापुर’ अब अपने सबसे बड़े चैप्टर के साथ बड़े पर्दे पर आ रही है। 4 सितंबर 2026 को रिलीज होने वाली 'मिर्जापुर: द मूवी' इस कल्ट फेनोमेनन को एक नए और भव्य अंदाज में पेश करेगी, जो पहले से कहीं ज्यादा बड़े स्केल और सिनेमाई अनुभव का वादा करती है।

थिएटर के अनुभव को ध्यान में रखते हुए हर किरदार, हर सीन और हर डायलॉग को पहले से ज्यादा दमदार बनाया गया है। फिल्म में पुराने आइकोनिक किरदारों के साथ-साथ कुछ नए चेहरे भी नजर आएंगे, जो कहानी को और गहराई देंगे।

इंडस्ट्री सोर्स के अनुसार, मिर्जापुर सीरीज ने बीना त्रिपाठी, गोलू और स्वीटी जैसे कई दमदार फीमेल कैरेक्टर्स दिए हैं, जिन्होंने मेल-डॉमिनेटेड कहानी में भी अपनी अलग पहचान बनाई। अब सवाल यह है कि 'मिर्जापुर: द मूवी' में क्या हमें और भी मजबूत महिला किरदार देखने को मिलेंगे?

रिपोर्ट्स के मुताबिक, यह फिल्म पहले से कहीं ज्यादा बड़ी, डार्क और सिनेमाई होगी। इसमें हाई-ऑक्टेन एक्शन, नए किरदार और कुछ पुराने चहेते चेहरों की वापसी देखने को मिल सकती है, जो इस फ्रैंचाइज़ी को एक नए स्तर पर ले जाएगी।

यह फिल्म सिर्फ एक एक्सटेंशन नहीं, बल्कि एक बड़ा सिनेमाई अनुभव बनने जा रही है। कहानी, किरदार, म्यूजिक और थीम—हर पहलू इसे एक खास फिल्म बनाते हैं।

‘मिर्जापुर: द मूवी’ उन बड़ी फिल्मों में से एक बनने जा रही है जो कल्ट सीरीज को बड़े पर्दे पर नई पहचान देगी और दर्शकों के लिए एक यादगार अनुभव साबित होगी।

title: Dangal TV Is All Set to Launch Its Much-Awaited New Show “Pati Anaadi”
excerpt: Dangal TV laa raha hai ek powerful kahaani ‘Pati Anaadi’, jisme dignity, control aur unconventional love ka intense safar dikhaya jayega, premiering 13th April at 6:30 PM.
content:
Dangal TV, India’s leading heartland entertainment channel, is all set to launch its much-awaited new show “Pati Anaadi”, a compelling narrative that explores power, identity, and emotional transformation. The show premieres on 13th April, Monday at 6:30 PM.

A powerful story of dignity, control, and unconventional love, Pati Anaadi asks a thought-provoking question—what happens when a woman fighting for dignity is bound to a man who sees the world differently, and both are trapped under the control of someone who refuses to let them break free?

The story follows Kishori, a fiercely self-respecting young woman who dreams of earning dignity through education. However, circumstances force her into a marriage with Lala (Avnish), the heir to a wealthy family. While Lala appears childlike and innocent, he carries a deeper emotional complexity and hidden intelligence. What seems like a step up in life soon turns into another cage.

At the center of the Agrawal household is Manjiri, Lala’s powerful elder sister and the true force behind the family empire. For her, control is everything, and Kishori is not a daughter-in-law but a threat. What unfolds is a gripping psychological battle where power, perception, and emotions collide.

As Kishori refuses to lose her identity and continues her journey towards dignity, an unexpected transformation begins—not just within her, but also within Lala. What starts as resistance slowly evolves into a complex and unconventional bond, challenging the very foundation of control within the household.

The show stars Brinda Dahal as the strong and fearless Kishori, Tanmay Nagar as the unpredictable yet endearing Lala, and Falak Naaz in a powerful role as Manjiri. The ensemble cast is further strengthened by Neelu Waghela, adding depth to the narrative.

Sharing his thoughts, Mr. Akshat Singhal, Director, Enterr10 Television said, "Pati Anaadi is a story that brings alive the silent battles people fight for dignity and identity within relationships. It is rooted, emotional, and deeply relatable."

Brinda Dahal added, "Kishori’s strength lies in her self-respect. She doesn’t wait for change, she becomes the change."

Tanmay Nagar shared, "Lala is pure, unpredictable, and unlike any character on television."

Falak Naaz said, "Manjiri is driven by control, but beneath that lies fear and vulnerability."

Directed by Pushkar Gosain, with story by Pankhuri Gangwal and Vaishali Naik, screenplay by Ananya Pattanaik, and dialogues by Yash Kumar Sharda, the show is crafted by a talented team. Music by Abhijeet Prabhakar further enhances the emotional depth of the story.

Watch Pati Anaadi every Monday to Saturday at 6:30 PM only on Dangal TV.

title: गोरखपुर में रिलीज हुआ पावर स्टार पवन सिंह का धमाकेदार गाना ‘टचबडी’, फैंस में मची धूम
excerpt: पवन सिंह का नया गाना ‘टचबडी’ गोरखपुर में रिलीज होते ही सोशल मीडिया पर छा गया। जॉनिता गांधी के साथ उनकी जोड़ी ने गाने को बनाया और भी खास।
content:
भोजपुरी संगीत जगत के सुपरस्टार पवन सिंह एक बार फिर अपने दमदार अंदाज में दर्शकों के बीच लौट आए हैं। इस बार वह अपनी आवाज़ और स्क्रीन प्रेजेंस के साथ पैन इंडिया फिल्म ‘डकैत: एक प्रेम कथा’ का बहुप्रतीक्षित गाना ‘टचबडी’ लेकर आए हैं, जिसे आज गोरखपुर में रिलीज किया गया। रिलीज होते ही यह गाना सोशल मीडिया और म्यूजिक प्लेटफॉर्म्स पर धूम मचा रहा है। इस गाने की खास बात यह है कि इसमें पवन सिंह के साथ मशहूर गायिका जॉनिता गांधी की आवाज़ भी सुनाई दे रही है, जिसने ट्रैक को और भी आकर्षक बना दिया है। गाने को हिंदी और तेलुगु—दोनों भाषाओं में शूट और रिकॉर्ड किया गया है, जिससे इसकी पहुंच देशभर के दर्शकों तक और मजबूत हो गई है。

‘टचबडी’ को लेकर पवन सिंह का उत्साह भी साफ नजर आता है। उन्होंने कहा कि उन्हें अपने संगीत के साथ नए-नए प्रयोग करना हमेशा पसंद है, और जब फिल्म के लीड स्टार अदिवी शेष ने उन्हें इस गाने का आइडिया बताया, तभी उन्होंने तय कर लिया था कि इसमें अलग तरह की ऊर्जा और जोश लेकर आना है। पवन सिंह ने बताया कि यह फिल्म एक इंटेंस और एक्शन-पैक्ड कहानी पर आधारित है, इसलिए गाने में भी उसी तरह का दमदार टेम्पो और स्टाइल जरूरी था। उन्होंने यह भी कहा कि जॉनिता गांधी और अदिवी शेष जैसे कलाकारों के साथ काम करना उनके लिए बेहद खास अनुभव रहा。

इस गाने की एक और खासियत यह है कि इसमें पवन सिंह सिर्फ गायक के रूप में ही नहीं, बल्कि अपने ट्रेडमार्क स्वैग और परफॉर्मेंस के साथ भी दर्शकों को आकर्षित करते नजर आ रहे हैं। स्क्रीन पर अदिवी शेष, पवन सिंह और जॉनिता गांधी की तिकड़ी ने मिलकर ऐसी एनर्जी और डांस पेश किया है, जो इसे इस सीजन का बड़ा डांस एंथम बना सकता है। गाने के बोल वायु श्रीवास्तव ने लिखे हैं, जबकि संगीत भीम्स सेसिरोलियो ने दिया है। पवन सिंह की दमदार आवाज़ और उनकी खास स्टाइल ने ‘टचबडी’ को एक अलग पहचान दी है, जो उनके फैंस को खूब पसंद आ रही है。

पवन सिंह के चाहने वालों के लिए यह गाना इसलिए भी खास है, क्योंकि यह भोजपुरी स्टारडम को एक बड़े पैन इंडिया मंच पर और मजबूती से स्थापित करता है। इससे साफ है कि ‘टचबडी’ सिर्फ एक गाना नहीं, बल्कि एक बड़े सिनेमाई और सांस्कृतिक क्रॉसओवर का प्रतीक बनकर उभर रहा है। फिल्म ‘डकैत: एक प्रेम कथा’ का निर्देशन शनील देव ने किया है, जो उनके निर्देशन की पहली फिल्म है। फिल्म को अन्नपूर्णा स्टूडियो के बैनर तले सुप्रिया यारलागड्डा ने प्रोड्यूस किया है, जबकि सह-निर्माता सुनील नारंग हैं। यह फिल्म 10 अप्रैल 2026 को पैन इंडिया स्तर पर रिलीज होगी। हालांकि, फिल्म से पहले ही पवन सिंह का यह गाना दर्शकों के दिलों पर राज करता नजर आ रहा है。

title: Valentine 2026: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile's Aayushi Khurrana on How Playing Reet Shaped Her Bond with Husband Suraj Kakkar
excerpt: Aayushi Khurrana opens up about how portraying Reet in Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile deepened her understanding of love and strengthened her real-life bond with husband Suraj Kakkar.
content:
Zee TV’s Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile, starring Bharat Ahlawwat as Raghav and Aayushi Khurrana as Reet, has been widely appreciated for its sensitive portrayal of love and relationships. While Raghav is intense and often struggles with anger rooted in past trauma, Reet represents patience, empathy, and a deep understanding of true love. As Valentine’s Week celebrates the spirit of togetherness, Aayushi reflects on how playing Reet shaped her understanding of love and influenced her real-life relationship with her husband, Suraj Kakkar.

Aayushi Khurrana shares that portraying Reet helped her understand the deeper meaning of love. The actress says, "I got married to my partner Suraj within just a month of Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile going on air. It felt almost surreal. Whatever Reet was going through on screen, I was experiencing similar emotions in my real life too. Portraying Reet made me understand that love is not just about big gestures; it's about patience, understanding, compromises, and choosing your partner every single day."

She further added, "Reet prioritises her family no matter what, and somewhere that stayed with me. It made me value my relationships more deeply and believe even more in love and marriage."

Talking about the current storyline, the show is focusing on how Reet, despite several attempts, failed to stop Unnati's wedding as she could not reveal Vikrant’s true face. She also failed to make her brother Dhruv understand that Kriti may not be the right partner for him. Meanwhile, as Reet and Raghav are soon going to become parents, the recent chaos has added more emotional drama to their lives.

Catch all the drama of Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile on Zee TV every day at 10:30 PM.

Valentine’s Day – 14th February | Pati Brahmachari
The contest winners had a special opportunity to meet their favourite actors during the grand Valentine’s celebration featuring Ashish Dixit and Prapti Shukla in a beautifully decorated setup. The winners also celebrated with the beloved on-screen duo Isha and Sooraj, making the experience even more memorable.

title: ‘Z’ Announces Maruti Suzuki Presents 24th Zee Cine Awards 2026, Taking FANtertainment to the Next Level
excerpt: To be hosted at Mumbai’s NSCI Dome, the awards reaffirm their commitment to a fan-powered celebration of cinema with the theme ‘Yeh Pal Hai Fans Ka’.
content:
‘Z’, India's leading Content and Technology Powerhouse, has played a defining role in shaping India’s entertainment landscape, continually reimagining how stories are told and experienced. The company pairs emotionally resonant storytelling with cutting-edge innovation to craft immersive entertainment experiences rooted in culture and built for the future across screens, formats, and languages.

Over the years, it has evolved into a much-loved celebration that reflects not only industry achievement, but also the enduring bond between cinema and its audiences, recognizing them as the true champions of cinema.

This year, ‘Z’ takes its fan-first philosophy FANtertainment to the next level with ‘Yeh Pal Hai Fans Ka’, reinforcing the belief that cinema’s most unforgettable moments are shaped by the love, loyalty, and passion of fans. Staying true to the spirit of ‘Yeh Pal Hai Fans Ka’, the announcement unfolded as an immersive experience where fans didn’t just witness the moment but shaped it. Akshay Kumar engaged directly with fans and invited the stars on stage to reveal the Maruti Suzuki presents 24th Zee Cine Awards 2026 ground event dates.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile’s Sehaj Rrajput’s Intense Assault Scene Has an Alia Bhatt’s Highway Connection
excerpt: Sehaj Rrajput opens up about performing an emotionally challenging physical assault scene in Zee TV’s Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile and reveals how Alia Bhatt’s Highway inspired her performance.
content:
Zee TV’s Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile, starring Bharat Ahlawwat as Raghav and Aayushi Khurrana as Reet, recently showcased one of its most sensitive and hard-hitting sequences. The episode featured Unnati’s character, portrayed by Sehaj Rrajput, facing a traumatic physical assault, making it one of the most emotionally powerful moments of the show so far.

In the episode, Unnati is assaulted by a scammer who has been stalking her, during a party. The scene highlights the intense emotional trauma she experiences after the incident. While it proved to be a crucial turning point in the narrative, the sequence was equally challenging for Sehaj Rrajput, as it marked the first time she performed such a physically and emotionally demanding scene on screen.

Speaking about the experience, Sehaj shared that the sequence involved a lot of physical action, including confronting and pushing the attacker. She credited the director for making the environment comfortable and helping her ease into the scene. Once the camera started rolling, she completely immersed herself in the moment. Although the scene affected her emotionally and took a toll on her, she believes that fully absorbing emotions is the most beautiful part of being an artist.

Sehaj further revealed that Alia Bhatt’s performance in Highway served as a source of inspiration for her. She recalled the scene where Alia’s character opens up about the assault she endured for years, which Sehaj had previously performed during her acting classes. Having practiced those emotions earlier helped her tap into the intensity required for the scene, though she admitted that even thinking about such situations in real life is frightening.

Going forward, the show will depict Unnati’s vulnerable emotional state as she struggles with panic attacks triggered by memories of the assault. How Reet and Raghav stand by her and help her cope with the trauma will be a major highlight in the upcoming episodes of Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile.

Catch all the gripping drama of Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile every day at 10:30 PM, only on Zee TV.

He shared that being part of a show that goes beyond entertainment and resonates with viewers’ lives is an honour, and that the constant love and support from audiences continues to motivate the entire team as they look ahead to future milestones.

As Mann Sundar steps forward beyond its 1500-episode landmark, it continues to shine as a beacon of positivity, empowerment, and emotional storytelling.

title: Z Launches Dilfluencer Moments: Attention That Builds Brand Love
excerpt: ‘Z’ launches Dilfluencer Moments, a new omnichannel media format designed to help brands move beyond visibility and build authentic brand love through character-led storytelling.
content:
Mumbai, India – ‘Z’, India's leading Content and Technology Powerhouse, today announced the launch of Dilfluencer Moments, a breakthrough omnichannel reach solution designed to help brands navigate multi-screen engagement and deliver creative cut-through.

In today’s transformed Indian advertising landscape, media accessibility has democratized, enabling brands of all sizes to buy inventory with ease. However, this democratization has created a new challenge: standing out in an ocean of advertising messages. As attention spans shrink and advertising clutter intensifies, marketers face a critical question—how do brands move from mere visibility to genuine memorability while building both brand love and action?

Dilfluencer Moments is ‘Z’s answer to this challenge. It is a character-led, moment-driven media format that transforms organic storytelling into viral engagement and measurable brand equity. Unlike traditional advertising formats that interrupt consumer experiences, Dilfluencer Moments embeds brands within culturally grounded narratives that audiences already love. By leveraging ‘Z’s trusted television characters—instantly recognizable figures embedded in millions of Indian homes—the solution creates authentic brand integrations that feel organic rather than intrusive.

The Dilfluencer Moments format is built on four strong pillars. First, Character-Led Authenticity, where ‘Z’s beloved characters act as cultural catalysts, bringing emotional resonance and credibility to brand stories. Second, TV-Originated Trust, where moments begin on television and extend seamlessly across digital, social, and creator ecosystems. Third, Organic Virality, turning narrative cues into shareable cultural signals that encourage genuine engagement. Finally, Platform-Agnostic Scale ensures consistent messaging across television, digital, social media, and creator networks.

The initiative launched with the TumHoLovely campaign on National Girl Child Day, carrying the message, Jab life ko leti ho lightly toh lagti ho aur bhi lovely. The storytelling, embedded across ‘Z’s Hindi and Marathi shows, travelled organically across digital platforms, generating millions of conversations and impressions through creator and community participation. A brand film featuring Sanya Malhotra further deepened the narrative, demonstrating how TV-led cultural cues translate into meaningful consumer engagement.

The campaign delivered impressive results, including over 25 million impressions across TV, Zee5, and digital platforms, more than one thousand meaningful audience conversations, and 2.5 million engagements reflecting deep consumer connection. The moment travelled organically from television to digital social platforms, WhatsApp forwards, and real-world conversations within just 24 hours.

Speaking about the launch, Laxmi Shetty, Head of Advertisement Revenue for Broadcast and Digital at Zee Entertainment Enterprises Ltd, said that as consumers turn away from interruption-led communication, advertisers need moments that feel culturally earned and emotionally authentic. She added that Dilfluencer Moments enables advertisers to transform rooted storytelling into brand love through character-first content and platform-agnostic distribution.

Kartik Mahadev, Chief Marketing Officer at Zee Entertainment Enterprises Ltd, highlighted that while access to impressions has become easier across platforms, affinity now drives real impact. He emphasized that moments powered by familiar characters and emotional storytelling have the ability to travel organically across screens, enabling brands to connect meaningfully with audiences at scale.

In a world where anyone can buy reach but only the right stories earn memory, Dilfluencer Moments offers marketers a cohesive and scalable ecosystem that embeds brands in culturally relevant moments, delivers organic engagement, provides multi-platform distribution, and converts attention into lasting brand love and emotional equity.

For more information, visit https://dilfluencer.com/moments

title: Dangal TV Announces Intense New Drama Ishq Junooni Premiering 26th January
excerpt: Dangal TV announces its new primetime fiction Ishq Junooni, an emotionally charged drama exploring love, revenge, and destiny, set to premiere on 26th January 2026.
content:
Can the most powerful love stories emerge from life’s most unexpected and tragic collisions? Dangal TV answers this question with its compelling new fiction drama, Ishq Junooni, premiering on 26th January 2026. Airing every Monday to Saturday at 10:00 PM, the show takes viewers on an emotionally charged journey where hatred transforms into healing and obsession evolves into unconditional love.

Set against a backdrop of raw power, deep-seated revenge, and moral conflict, Ishq Junooni narrates the unconventional saga of two enemies forced into a marriage that will transform them both.

The narrative centers on the explosive dynamic between Guru and Ruhaani, individuals from vastly different worlds whose destinies are violently altered by a tragic incident. Guru, portrayed by Abhishek Pathaniya, is a conflicted gangster from a powerful Dabang family, crushed under the weight of a violent legacy he never chose. Ruhaani, played by Anjali Sharma, is an ambitious MBBS aspirant forced into marriage, secretly burning with vengeance against Guru for a perceived injustice against her brother.

As the story unfolds, their forced union becomes an emotional war zone where ego clashes with vulnerability and revenge collides with empathy. The central question driving the narrative is whether their thirst for revenge will eventually transform into love.

Speaking on the launch, Manish Singhal, Managing Director of Dangal TV, said, “We believe in telling stories that are deeply emotional and reflect real human struggles. Ishq Junooni is one such intense story that highlights how destiny binds people together, helping them evolve. It’s a journey of love, sacrifice, and self-realisation that we are confident will strike a chord with our audience.”

Sharing her thoughts, Anjali Sharma said, “Ruhaani is a girl of immense strength whose life pushes her into unimaginable tests. Playing her has allowed me to explore vulnerability, determination, and hidden courage simultaneously. I’m thrilled to bring this layered character to life on Dangal TV.”

Abhishek Pathaniya added, “Guru is torn between love and violence, aggressive on the outside due to family pressure but soft-hearted within. His journey is about emotional redemption as much as survival. Playing such a complex character has been creatively fulfilling.”

Witness the collision of hatred and healing in Ishq Junooni, starting 26th January 2026, every Monday to Saturday at 10:00 PM, only on Dangal TV.

title: ICH NEXT and Peclers Paris Announce India-First Global X Local Trend Intelligence Service to Address a $2B+ White Space
excerpt: ICH NEXT, India’s leading indigenous trend forecasting platform, announced a partnership with Peclers Paris to launch India-first trend intelligence reports designed for local consumers and business realities.
content:
ICH NEXT and Peclers Paris Announce India-First Global X Local Trend Intelligence Service to Address a $2B+ White Space

New Delhi, India, 21st January 2026: ICH NEXT, India’s leading indigenous trend forecasting platform, today announced a partnership with Peclers Paris, a leading worldwide consulting agency in creative strategy and prospective trends, supporting brands in shaping their future. The alliance marks the launch of the ICH NEXT x Peclers Paris Trend Forecast Reports in Categories of western fashion, designed to address a long-standing gap in India’s fashion and lifestyle ecosystem: the lack of research-led, India-first trend intelligence built for local consumers and business realities.

India’s fashion and lifestyle market is projected to exceed USD 240 billion, growing at over 10% annually. Yet much of the industry continues to rely on global trend reports that offer broad inspiration but limited relevance to India’s cultural diversity, climate, craft traditions, body types, and consumption cycles. The ICH NEXT x Peclers Paris collaboration aims to change this by combining global foresight with deeply contextual, India-based research.

Anuradha Chandrasekhar and Kanika Vohra, Co-founders ICH NEXT said, “India needs a localised lens in trend forecasting because it is not a single, homogeneous market nor a fast follower of the West. Multiple consumer segments, festival-led demand cycles, extended summers, and strong cultural meanings around colour, silhouette, and occasion reshape how trends are adopted. At the same time, India is no longer only adapting global trends - it is actively shaping them. From tech and digital behaviour to beauty rituals and fashion aesthetics, the country is emerging as a source of innovation and influence, with homegrown brands, creators, and consumers setting new cultural cues.”

“As a result, trend forecasting for India must move beyond translation to origination. The market is now primed to define its own benchmarks - allowing brands not only to respond accurately to Indian demand, but to identify where India itself will lead the next wave of global cultural and commercial trends. The industry needs a research lens rooted in local culture, powered by data, and designed to solve real business challenges. This partnership allows us to combine global perspective with deep Indian insight to help businesses anticipate, adapt, and lead in a way the industry has never seen before.”

Launched in 2022, ICH NEXT has become a trusted trend intelligence platform for over 100 brands and Labels, including Jaypore from Aditya Birla Fashion & Lifestyle, Amazon, Myntra, Flipkart, Reliance Trends, Ajio, and brands within the Tata Trent portfolio like Westside and Samoh, recording 45% year-on-year subscriber growth and a 90% renewal rate. At the core of the platform is ICHNEXTLABS.ai, a proprietary intelligence engine that blends AI, machine learning, image intelligence and human cultural expertise, analysing over 60,000 social and cultural signals and 3,000+ macro articles every month to deliver proper guidance across colour, fabric, silhouettes, patterns, and pricing. Brands using this platform have reported faster design cycles, improved sell-through, and stronger category performance, with some achieving 4-7x revenue per style through trend-aligned launches.

Peclers Paris, part of the USD 20 billion WPP network, brings over five decades of experience in shaping forward-thinking brand visions, with a strong heritage in fashion, aesthetics, and design innovation. Through strategic consulting and seasonal trend publications, the agency helps global clients across multiple industries; fashion, beauty, design, lifestyle, hospitality, and food, shape their future, reveal their uniqueness, and create more desirable products, services, and experiences. Leveraging proprietary consumer intelligence methodologies, Peclers Paris moves brands beyond surface trends to decode the deeper forces shaping their audiences now and in the future. Its expertise is trusted by leading global brands in luxury and retail.

Anne Etienne-Reboul, CEO, Peclers Paris, said, “India is one of the most influential consumer markets globally today. Its cultural depth, creativity and confidence demand a different approach to forecasting. Through this collaboration, we are excited to combine our global perspective with ICH NEXT’s deep local understanding to create intelligence that is both visionary and truly relevant for Indian brands.”

The ICH NEXT x Peclers Paris Trend Forecast Report delivers India-focused insights across fashion and lifestyle segments, decoding the political, economic, and cultural forces shaping future consumer demand to help brands reduce risk and make sharper design decisions. ICH NEXT is expected to close the current financial year at an estimated USD 0.4 million in revenue and plans to double its turnover next year, and is looking to invest USD 1.5 million over the next three years to scale its technology and expand category coverage. As India shifts from being a trend-following to a trend-shaping market, this alliance marks a new phase where indigenous, research-led intelligence drives better business outcomes.

title: Chatha Pacha Audio Trailer Launch Kochi, Kochi Braces for a Musical Blast as Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy Arrive for the Audio and Trailer Launch of Reel World Entertainment's Chatha Pacha
excerpt: Lulu Mall, Kochi is set to witness a massive musical and cinematic celebration as Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy arrive for the audio and trailer launch of Chatha Pacha ahead of its theatrical release.
content:
Kochi is gearing up for a high-octane musical and cinematic spectacle as legendary composer trio Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy arrive in the city for the audio launch and much-awaited trailer release of Reel World Entertainment’s action entertainer Chatha Pacha: The Ring of Rowdies, ahead of its release on January 22. Chatha Pacha also marks Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy’s debut in Malayalam cinema, a collaboration that has already sent anticipation soaring across industries and fan communities alike.

Renowned for crafting soundtracks that transcend generations, the trio’s entry into Mollywood has amplified expectations around the film’s music-driven energy and mass appeal.

The grand event is scheduled for January 15 at Lulu Mall, Kochi, poised to turn the city into the epicentre of cinema buzz and fan frenzy. While the arrival of Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy marks a historic moment, the spotlight firmly rests on the first-ever trailer reveal of Chatha Pacha; a glimpse that fans have been eagerly waiting for.

With constant updates, sneak peeks, and music teasers setting social media abuzz, Chatha Pacha is rapidly building momentum as one of the most talked-about upcoming big-ticket releases. The title track, dropped recently, has already become a sensation, with its high-energy composition dominating playlists and social media chatter.

Alongside the track, the teaser and character posters of Arjun Ashokan, Roshan Mathew, Vishak Nair, and Ishan Shoukath have also been well received, generating steady buzz.

Backed by Creative Producer Shihan Shoukath, along with Ritesh and Ramesh S. Ramakrishnan and Shoukath Ali, and directed by debutant Adhvaith Nayar, Chatha Pacha is mounted as a stylish, high-energy action entertainer. With a narrative pulse inspired by the raw intensity of the wrestling ring, the film promises striking visuals, pulsating music, and a kinetic cinematic experience designed for the big screen.

The film features a powerful ensemble cast including Arjun Ashokan, Roshan Mathew, Vishak Nair, Ishan Shoukath, along with several prominent names from the industry. Adding to the intrigue, it is also reported that megastar Mammootty appears in a special role, further fuelling excitement and speculation around the project.

The technical backbone of Chatha Pacha is equally formidable, with Anend C. Chandran behind the camera, Mujeeb Majeed composing the background score, Kalai Kingson choreographing the action sequences, and Praveen Prabhakar handling editing. The screenplay is penned by Sanoop Thykoodam, while music is composed by Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy, with lyrics by Vinayak Sasikumar, marking a landmark musical collaboration for Malayalam cinema.

The January 15 event is expected to be a landmark celebration for Chatha Pacha, drawing fans, media, and film personalities in large numbers. Lulu Mall, Kochi will transform into a vibrant arena of sound, spectacle, and cinematic frenzy as the countdown to release accelerates.

As anticipation continues to surge both online and offline, Chatha Pacha is gearing up for a full-blown musical and action explosion, with the trailer launch set to ignite the countdown to its grand theatrical release on January 22.

title: “Playing Dev brought me closer to my parents,” says Abhishek Sharma
excerpt: Abhishek Sharma opens up about an emotional moment while playing Devansh Singh Chauhan in Zee TV’s Vasudha, revealing how the role brought him closer to his parents.
content:
Zee TV’s Vasudha continues to be one of the most-loved shows on Indian television today, winning hearts with its gripping storytelling, layered characters, and emotional depth. The audience isn’t the only one deeply connected to the narrative; sometimes, the story touches the actors just as profoundly. And recently, actor Abhishek Sharma, who plays Devansh Singh Chauhan, experienced a moment on set that affected him far beyond the camera.

In the ongoing track, the drama intensifies as Chandrika’s fury only grows as she refuses to even acknowledge him when he comes to meet her. While Dev struggles to calm her, Vasudha faces shocking humiliation at the hotel when the Chauhan Group abruptly cancels her booking, forcing her to vacate the room.

Opening about the experience, Abhishek shared, “There was a scene where Dev breaks down in front of Chandrika, asking her why she isn’t talking to him. While the scene was written with a lot of emotion, I didn’t expect it to hit me personally. After the take, I went back to my room and actually cried. I don’t usually react that way. Something about Dev’s pain triggered something in me. The first thing I did after pack-up was call my parents… and I rarely do that. That moment made me realise how much of Dev’s emotional journey has rubbed off on me.”

He added, “I was never extremely expressive with my family, but because of Dev, somewhere I’ve opened more. This role hasn’t just helped me grow as an actor; it has brought me closer to my parents without me even realising it.”

As *Vasudha* builds toward powerful confrontations, heartfelt revelations, and life-changing decisions, the show continues to connect with viewers—and now, even more deeply with the actors who bring its world to life.

*Tune in to Vasudha every day at 9:30 PM, only on Zee TV!*

title: Double 10, Double Entertainment! “Shrimati Shukla” Launches 10th November, 10 PM on Dangal TV
excerpt: Get ready for 10 on 10 entertainment as Dangal TV launches its new heartwarming family drama 'Shrimati Shukla', premiering on 10th November at 10:00 PM.
content:
Double 10, Double Entertainment! “Shrimati Shukla” Launches 10th November, 10 PM on Dangal TV

Get ready for a 10 on 10 entertainment extravaganza as *Shrimati Shukla* premieres on 10th November, Monday at 10:00 PM, only on Dangal TV.

Dangal TV, the heartland’s most trusted and loved entertainment channel, known for presenting powerful, relatable, and socially impactful stories, brings yet another show that will deeply resonate with audiences across India. Bhakti Chauhan essays the title role of *Shrimati Shukla*, portraying a woman who faces life’s challenges with courage, compassion, and an unwavering smile.

[image1: Bhakti Chauhan as Shrimati Shukla in the upcoming Dangal TV show]

This heart-touching family drama delves into the life of Shrimati Shukla, a devoted homemaker who has always put her family’s happiness before her own. Like many women, she wears countless hats — as a wife, a mother, and a nurturer — yet, over time, her presence begins to fade into the background. Her sacrifices often go unnoticed, and she becomes so immersed in her family’s needs that she forgets to care for herself.

Bhakti Chauhan says, “In every home, there’s a Shrimati Shukla — a woman who silently sacrifices, yet stands the strongest. This show beautifully reflects that emotion, and I believe audiences will find a piece of their own lives in this story. I’m truly grateful to Dangal TV for allowing me to portray such a powerful and relatable character — one that connects with households across every corner of the country.”

[image2: Bhakti Chauhan shares her thoughts on playing Shrimati Shukla]

She adds, “Playing Shrimati Shukla has been an emotional journey for me — she represents the countless women who keep their families together with love, patience, and strength, often without expecting anything in return. Through her story, the viewers will see not just a character, but a reflection of the women who make every home complete.”

[image3: The cast of Shrimati Shukla gearing up for the show's premiere]

The supporting cast features Kapil Arya as Ravi, Riddhi Thakur as Ashlesha, Chandan as Anuj, Padmesh Pandit as Sudhir Shukla, Pawan Kumar Singh as Deven, Sonu Chandrapal as Sakshi, Chaitanya Vyas as Aditya, and Keertika Gupta as Anita, all playing pivotal roles in the story.

Stay tuned for *Shrimati Shukla* – premiering 10th November 2025, Monday at 10:00 PM on Dangal TV!

title: Mission Kashmir Turns 25 – Why It Remains One of Bollywood’s Most Powerful Films
excerpt: 25 years on, Vidhu Vinod Chopra’s ‘Mission Kashmir’ continues to resonate for its emotion, music, and meaning — here’s why it remains unforgettable.
content:
25 years of Mission Kashmir: A film that redefined emotion, music, and meaning in Indian cinema

It’s been 25 years since Vidhu Vinod Chopra’s Mission Kashmir first hit theatres, yet the film continues to hold a special place in the hearts of audiences. From its breathtaking cinematography to its timeless music and unforgettable performances, here’s why this landmark movie remains one of Bollywood’s most powerful and emotionally resonant stories.

1. Hrithik Roshan’s unforgettable performance - As Altaaf, Hrithik Roshan delivered one of the most powerful performances of his early career — intense, emotional, and hauntingly real. He captured the turmoil of a boy torn apart by loss and driven by vengeance, blending raw emotion with impeccable physicality in the film’s gripping action sequences. His portrayal brought both fire and fragility to the screen, making Altaaf a character that continues to stay with audiences even 25 years later.

[image1: Hrithik Roshan as Altaaf in Mission Kashmir]

2. Vidhu Vinod Chopra’s deep connection with Kashmir - Few filmmakers capture the heart of a place like Vidhu Vinod Chopra does with Kashmir. Having grown up there, his connection with the valley runs deep, and that authenticity shines through every frame. For him, Mission Kashmir wasn’t just a film — it was destiny. The story reflects his love for the land and his compassion for its people, making it as heartfelt as it is cinematic.

[image2: Director Vidhu Vinod Chopra during the shoot in Kashmir]

3. The picturesque valley and brilliant cinematography - Set against the stunning snow-laden landscapes of Kashmir, the film’s visuals remain iconic even today. The cinematography by Binod Pradhan elevated the storytelling — every shot looked like a painting, and yet carried the raw, lived-in emotion of the place. The valley wasn’t just a backdrop; it was a character in itself.

[image3: The breathtaking valley scenes captured in the movie]

4. Music that became the sound of a generation - With songs like Bumbro, Socho Ke Jheelon Ka Sheher Ho, and Rind Posh Maal, Mission Kashmir delivered a soundtrack that still lives rent-free in the hearts of audiences. The music by Shankar-Ehsaan-Loy, coupled with Rahat Indori and Sameer’s lyrics, brought together folk roots, rhythm, and emotion in a way few soundtracks have since.

5. A story that remains relevant — even today - At its core, Mission Kashmir is about identity, love, loss, and the human cost of violence — themes that remain timeless. Its moral complexity and emotional honesty made it ahead of its time in 2000, and two-and-a-half decades later, it continues to resonate deeply.

Here’s to 25 years of Mission Kashmir — a film that wasn’t just made, but felt; not just remembered, but relived.

title: Paro Sang Dev on Dangal TV – A Journey of Raw Emotions and Powerful Human Stories
excerpt: Dangal TV’s Paro Sang Dev presents a mystery wrapped in heartfelt drama, exploring survival, dignity, traditions, and aspirations through the journey of Paro and Dev.
content:
Dangal TV’s Paro Sang Dev brings audiences a captivating new mystery wrapped in heartfelt drama. Known for its impactful storytelling, the channel introduces a unique narrative where survival, dignity, and love collide. The story follows Paro, portrayed by Jahnvi Soni, a spirited village girl who refuses to let poverty crush her dreams, and Dev, played by Arjun Verma, a principled young man from a privileged background. Bound by a lie that leads to an accidental marriage, the show unravels dark truth as the characters seek hope rather than love or belonging. Set against the backdrop of rural India, the show also delves into the clash between traditions and aspirations, highlighting how courage and determination can redefine destiny. With Paro’s resilience and Dev’s idealism at its heart, Paro Sang Dev goes beyond being a love story to become a powerful tale of second chances, perseverance, and the unyielding human spirit.

Arjun Verma, who plays Dev, expressed, “The show sheds light on the harsh realities and long-standing misconceptions of rural India. I am truly thankful to Dangal TV for providing me with this opportunity. Rather than offering fairy tales, the story unfolds raw, emotional, and powerful human journeys that embody self-worth, resilience, and the transformative strength of love.”

Jahnvi Soni, who brings Paro to life, added, “Paro is a simple village girl with big dreams who, despite endless hardships, never gives up. An accidental marriage changes the course of her life, opening a new path toward her ambitions. The narrative navigates betrayal and heartbreak with self-belief, endurance, and love that heals and transforms — not perfect fantasies, but genuine, heartfelt journeys of triumph. I am grateful to Dangal TV for giving me the chance to portray such a strong female character.”

Stay tuned to watch Paro Sang Dev every Monday to Saturday at 10.00 pm only on Dangal TV and anytime on the Dangal Play app.

title: “My character is the personification of greed,” says Manav Gohil from COLORS’ ‘Binddii’
excerpt: No prison wall is strong enough to cage a mother’s spirit. COLORS brings a stirring tale of love, betrayal, and resilience in its new drama Binddii.
content:
No prison wall is strong enough to cage a mother’s spirit. Carrying forward its legacy of fearless and raw sagas, COLORS brings a stirring tale of love, betrayal, and resilience in its new drama Binddii.

Born behind bars, Binddii’s world begins and ends with her mother Kajal, whose warmth turns a prison cell into her haven. But when fate pulls her into the outside world, she is thrown into a ruthless battle where survival is the only choice.

In the heart of Mathura, Binddii discovers the bitter truth: her father Aviraj’s lies for mafia don Dayanand Chaudhury’s thirst for power shattered her mother’s life. As danger looms and enemies circle once again, Binddii must summon the courage to defy them all and fight for her mother’s freedom.

Starring Radhika Muthukumar as Kajal, Saachi Bhoyar as Binddii, Krushal Ahuja as Aviraj, and Manav Gohil as Dayanand, Binddii airs every day at 8:30 pm on COLORS and JioHotstar.

Excerpts from Manav Gohil’s interview:

1. Tell us about the show.
A. Binddii is the saga of a daughter’s fight for her imprisoned mother. Born and raised inside prison walls, Binddii’s only world is Kajal, whose love turns iron bars into a haven of joy and hope. But their fragile happiness is shattered when the law forces Binddii out, leaving her unprotected and alone in a hostile world she has never known. When her uncle Saurav takes her to his home in Mathura, the past begins to resurface. She discovers that her father, Aviraj, had conned Kajal, conspiring with the ruthless mafia don Dayanand Chaudhury for money and power. Determined to right these wrongs, Binddii sets out to educate herself and one day free her mother, but the challenge is that Aviraj and Dayanand are closing in on the mother-daughter. The story rides on her inspiring journey to fight this impossible battle that is tilted in favour of the powerful.

2. What drew you to Binddii and your role in particular?
A. Dayanand Chaudhury is one of those characters who frightens you with their unpredictability. He started as a petty criminal, always scheming for shortcuts to wealth, and over the years, he’s built himself into a mafia don who wears the mask of a respectable man. And yet, for all his darkness, he has this very human layer - his love for his son. He uses acts of kindness as stepping stones for political power. My character is the personification of greed.

3. The show exposes how greed can destroy families. Do you think audiences will see shades of their surroundings in this story?
A. Absolutely. Greed isn’t only measured in money. It shows up in everyday choices where personal gain outweighs relationships. Most families have seen it in some form. Binddii mirrors this reality through its characters, and audiences will connect with the show.

4. Each character represents a side of society - nurturing, innocent and corrupt. Which side has the upper hand?
A. Greed and corruption may seem powerful in the moment; yet over time, it is love, innocence, and justice that truly prevail. Families cannot thrive on greed, and societies cannot recover through corruption; they survive because of compassion, resilience, and the fight for what’s right.

5. Dayanand seems like an outright evil man. How did you ensure he feels menacing yet believable?
A. The scariest kind of evil is the one that doesn’t announce itself. Real menace hides in restraint, in silence, in the ability to look you in the eye and never flinch. His danger lies in his conviction - he doesn’t second-guess, he doesn’t apologise, he doesn’t feel guilt.

6. You’ve played a range of roles over your career. What makes Dayanand stand apart from the others?
A. Most of the characters I’ve portrayed had a shade of humanity. Dayanand is different. He doesn’t seek your sympathy, he doesn’t need validation, and he certainly doesn’t have a redemptive bone in his body. He thrives on destruction and power.

7. What is scarier: a villain with no remorse or one who justifies every action as ‘necessary’?
A. Without doubt, a villain who justifies every action. That kind of character doesn’t just harm you, he convinces you that the harm is for your own good.

8. Dayanand thrives on corruption and control. Did you base him on real-world figures?
A. The world around us gives an actor plenty of raw material. Dayanand is stitched together from fragments of people we’ve seen: politicians, businessmen, and power brokers.

9. Do you see Dayanand as a mirror of real-world power brokers?
A. Dayanand isn’t fiction; he reflects our society where unchecked ambition mutates into corruption.

10. What is your message to viewers?
A. I want to thank the audience for the overwhelming response to Binddii. Dayanand may represent everything we dislike in power, but Binddii represents the courage and innocence we need to protect. Keep watching Binddii, every day at 8:30 PM on COLORS and JioCinema.

Witness a daughter’s warrior spirit and a mother’s love that defies all chains in ‘Binddii’; airs every day at 8:30 pm only on COLORS.

title: Marathi Star Sanchi Bhoyar opens up about learning Mathura’s Brijbhasha for her Hindi TV debut in COLORS’ ‘Binddii’
excerpt: They say language is the road map of culture. For child actor Sanchi Bhoyar, who earlier charmed audiences in Marathi with Indrayani, learning Brijbhasha in Mathura became the compass for her first Hindi lead role in COLORS’ ‘Binddii’.
content: They say language is the road map of culture. For child actor Sanchi Bhoyar, who earlier charmed audiences in Marathi with Indrayani, learning Brijbhasha in Mathura became the compass for her first Hindi lead role in COLORS’ ‘Binddii’.Starring alongside Radhika Muthukumar, the show follows the story of a young girl born behind bars, who grows up wrapped in her mother Kajal’s love inside prison, and then has to face the unfamiliar world outside. Set in Mathura, Binddii’s world pulses with the rhythms of its local dialect, which is why Sanchi’s preparation to learn brijbhasha was crucial. Speaking in Brijbhasha doesn’t just ground Binddii to the soil of Mathura but it also makes her dreams and challenges feel real, whether it’s going to school or fighting for her mother’s freedom.Sanchi Bhoyar, playing titular role in COLORS’ Binddii, shares, “This is my very first Hindi television show, so everything feels new and exciting for me. To play Binddii, I had to not only understand her emotions but also learn Brijbhasha, which is spoken in Mathura. At first, it was challenging, because the words and tone are different from both Marathi and Hindi but since we were shooting in Mathura, I began picking up the words directly from the people there. Simple things like saying Radhe Radhe (hello) or calling Radhika ma’am, who is playing my on-screen mother, Maiyya, made me feel like I was living in Binddii’s world. These little words made Binddii real for me, I started feeling closer to her world, and I believe  my efforts will make her journey more real for the viewers
